site.name: La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
site.tagline: Family holiday home with heated indoor pool & spa — Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence

footer.familyPool: Family holiday home · Heated indoor pool
footer.contactForm: Write to us via the form

home.seoTitle: Holiday home with heated indoor pool in Aix-en-Provence — La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
home.seoDescription: Family holiday home for 4-5 guests with a heated indoor pool and spa in Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence. Weekly rental in summer, monthly rental of the house from October to June.
home.heroTitle: La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
home.heroSubtitle: Family holiday home with heated indoor pool & spa — Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence.
home.photoHero: [ HERO PHOTO — heated indoor pool + pine garden, bright ]
home.weekText: July to September — Saturday to Saturday, heated indoor pool included, spa optional.
home.monthText: October to June — house only, continuously or seasonally depending on your dates. On request.
home.reviewsPending: Google reviews will appear here once the listing is connected.
home.locationText: In the heart of Puyricard, between pine forest and countryside, minutes from the markets, the streets of Aix and the most beautiful villages of the Aix area.

house.seoTitle: The house — 2-bedroom home for 4-5 | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
house.seoDescription: Holiday home in Aix-en-Provence: 2 bedrooms, equipped kitchen, bright living room, enclosed garden in the pines, heated indoor pool and optional spa.
house.intro: A tastefully furnished house blending modern comfort with old-world charm. Quiet under the pines, the house is designed for families. You will find all the comfort of a true Provençal home: generous living spaces, a full kitchen, two bedrooms, and direct access to the heated indoor pool.

equipment.title: 2 bedrooms
equipment.text:
One 160 double bed, two single beds.
Extra bed at additional cost.

equipment.title: Air conditioning
equipment.text: Comfort in hot weather, throughout the house.

equipment.title: Outdoor games
equipment.text: Table tennis, trampoline, sun loungers, bikes.

equipment.title: Parking
equipment.text:
3 private spaces on the property.
Optional electric-vehicle socket.

equipment.title: Indoor pool
equipment.text: Heated, direct access from the living room.

equipment.title: Private garden
equipment.text: Enclosed garden in the pines with terrace.

goodToKnow: Baby cot available on request, free of charge.
Our four-legged friends are welcome on request.

pool.seoTitle: Heated indoor pool & spa | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
pool.seoDescription: Private heated indoor pool at 29-30 °C, direct access from the living room, plus an optional 4-seat Hotspring spa, in Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence.
pool.title: Heated indoor pool & spa
pool.poolText: Private indoor pool 530 × 330 × 140 cm, water at 29-30 °C, direct access from the living room or terrace.
pool.spaTitle: The Hotspring spa, a moment to yourself
pool.spaText: 4-seat covered Hotspring spa, adjustable from 26 to 40 °C, with massage jets. Private use at €200/week.
pool.photoHero: [ PHOTO — heated indoor pool, water reflections, light ]
pool.photoPool: [ PHOTO — pool, access from the living room ]
pool.noParties: Parties and festive events are not permitted.
pool.noPartiesText: The house is a peaceful family place; please help us preserve its calm.
pool.heatingNote: Pool heated from July to late October. The pool is not heated in December, January and February.

rates.seoTitle: Rates & Booking | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
rates.seoDescription: Weekly in summer with heated pool, or monthly from October to June. Indicative rates and online booking via chambresdhotes.org.
rates.title: Two ways to book
rates.intro: Weekly in summer, with pool and spa — or monthly the rest of the year. Choose the path that suits you.
rates.weekSubtitle: Saturday to Saturday · heated pool included · spa optional
rates.conditionsText: 20% at booking (card or e-ANCV), balance on key handover.
rates.bookingRule: Rental Saturday to Saturday only (7 nights).
rates.availConfirm: Availability will be confirmed during booking.
rates.monthSubtitle1: House only, without pool or spa
rates.monthSubtitle2: Ideal for: mobility lease · students · temporary housing
rates.monthText: Continuously from 1 October to 30 June, on request.

discover.seoTitle: Things to do around Aix-en-Provence | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
discover.seoDescription: Getaways, activities and good addresses around Puyricard and Aix-en-Provence: châteaux, the Luberon, the Calanques, Cassis, restaurants and ice-cream makers.
discover.title: Discoveries around La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
discover.intro: The Aix countryside within reach: châteaux, hilltop villages, markets and good tables. Here are our favourites.

reviews.seoTitle: Guest reviews | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
reviews.seoDescription: Google reviews from guests who have stayed at La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins, a holiday home with heated indoor pool in Aix-en-Provence.
reviews.title: They stayed with us
reviews.summary2: by families and couples who stayed at the house.
reviews.placeholder: Google reviews will appear here once the Google Business Profile is connected.

contact.seoTitle: Contact & directions | La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins
contact.seoDescription: Contact La Petite Maison Sous Les Pins in Puyricard, Aix-en-Provence: phone, email, form, map and directions.
contact.title: Get in touch & getting here
contact.intro: A question about dates, the house, the pool? Write to us or call — we’re happy to help.
howToCome: By car, about 15 min from the centre of Aix-en-Provence.
Private parking for 3 cars on the property.
We welcome you personally on arrival.
